text.title: vr-design-patterns Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the artefact produced by the vr-design-patterns methodology. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Missing __faion_header__; scene without ground/horizon; smooth-locomotion default; smooth-turn default; head-locked primary UI; seated_toggle false.

list.item: Scene with has_ground == false or has_horizon == false.
Any accessibility flag set to false.
